jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Myntra - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Myntra. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Myntra:
Myntra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra!
